title: campylospermum barberi
intro: Campylospermum barberi is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae, commonly known as the "barberi plant" or "bitter apple", and is native to tropical Africa. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic compounds that can help to treat wounds, fever, and other health issues. The health benefits of Campylospermum barberi include its ability to reduce inflammation, fight off infections, and support the immune system, making it a valuable remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues.
